Loading country data...

🌍 How to Navigate

Drag Rotate the globe
Scroll Zoom in/out
Click Select country & view details
Drag header Move info panel
Ctrl+K Search countries
Double-click Reset view
ESC Close panels
- Countries
- Alliances
- Wars

Press ESC to close • Double-click background to reset view
